title: Aurora, 61399, Iris Lamb 7In, Soft Toy, White
features: From Aurora's range of Cuddle Pals
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable super soft Iris White Lamb cuddly toy
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Cuddle Pals is Aurora World’s cutest and cuddliest range of collectable animals. Introducing our gorgeous white Lamb named Iris. Made using the softest materials, you will not believe until you touch her, how soft the material is. Iris is the perfect present for birthdays, spring time, Easter and just because. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
